zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington於大約1080年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Peter Piers De Valognes33歲，母親Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur29歲。他和Agnes FitzJohn至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1162年在英國享年83歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可賓納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington于大约1080年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Peter Piers De Valognes33岁，母亲Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur29岁。他和Agnes FitzJohn至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1162年在英国享年83岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可賓納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington was born about 1080, in Normandy, France, his father, Peter Piers De Valognes, was 33 and his mother, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Agnes FitzJohn. He died in 1162, in England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Binham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington est né environ 1080, à Normandie, France, son père, Peter Piers De Valognes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes FitzJohn. Il est décédé en 1162, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Binham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington um 1080 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Piers De Valognes 33 und seine Mutter Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur 29. Er hatte mit Agnes FitzJohn mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1162 im Alter von 83 Jahren in England und wurde in Binham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington è nato il circa 1080 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Peter Piers De Valognes, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Agnes FitzJohn. Morì nel 1162, nel England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Binham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Valognes Lord of Beningtonが約1080年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Peter Piers De Valognesは33歳，母Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveurは29歳であった。彼はAgnes FitzJohnとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1162年にイギリスで83歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクビンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Piers De Valognes(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Agnes FitzJohn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 영국에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 빈함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Peter Piers De Valognes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Agnes FitzJohn. Ele faleceu em 1162, em Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Binham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington родился около 1080 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Peter Piers De Valognes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Agnes FitzJohn. Он умер в 1162 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности бинам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington nació aproximadamente 1080, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Peter Piers De Valognes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Agnes FitzJohn. Murió en 1162, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Binham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
